pipeline.description: 9-step verification pipeline: validate envelope integrity, verify identity, enforce scope, burn nonce, audit.

steps.name: envelope_exists
steps.description: Check that a sealed envelope JSON file exists in gate/incoming/ and can be parsed. Verify all required_fields are present. Verify source_partition is in trusted_source_partitions.
steps.command: python -c "from boundaries.transition_gate import TransitionEnvelope; e = TransitionEnvelope.from_file('gate/incoming/envelope_*.json'); print('OK')"
steps.expected_output: Envelope loaded with all required fields present and source_partition trusted.

steps.name: payload_integrity
steps.description: Recompute SHA-256 of the payload using canonical JSON serialization (sorted keys, no extra whitespace). Compare against envelope.payload_hash using timing-safe hmac.compare_digest.

steps.name: fingerprint_match
steps.description: Recompute user fingerprint using the shared secret (from Windows Credential Manager, key_name=TransitionGate) and the machine_fingerprint embedded in the envelope. Compare with hmac.compare_digest (timing-safe). NEVER log the secret.

steps.name: nonce_valid
steps.description: Check that the nonce exists in the nonce registry at registry_path, has not been burned, and has not expired (age < max_age_seconds). Mark as pending-burn only — actual burn happens in step 9 after all checks pass.
steps.expected_output: Nonce is valid, unburned, and within max_age_seconds.

steps.name: timestamp_fresh
steps.description: Verify that the envelope's timestamp is within max_age_seconds (600s) of current time. Reject stale envelopes to prevent delayed replay attacks.

steps.name: tests_verified
steps.description: Verify that the source reports tests_passed=true in the envelope. Lint check: require lint_passed=true only if require_lint is enabled in GateKeeper config. These reflect source-side quality gate execution.
steps.expected_output: tests_passed=true (and lint_passed=true if require_lint is configured).

steps.name: scope_present
steps.description: Verify that the envelope contains a non-empty scope declaration with at least one permission. All permissions must be within known_permissions. Any unknown permission causes rejection.
steps.expected_output: Scope declaration present with recognized permissions only.

steps.name: deploy_within_scope
steps.description: Verify that the requested_action (e.g. deploy, run_tests, start_server) is listed in the envelope's scope.permissions. Reject any action not explicitly granted. Unknown permissions are always rejected regardless of scope.
steps.expected_output: Requested action is within the declared scope permissions.

steps.name: audit_log
steps.description: Burn the nonce (mark as used in nonce registry, persist to disk). Append a verification result entry to gate/audit.ndjson: envelope_id, timestamp, status, reason, step results, duration_ms, nonce_burned=true. Feed event to Overwatch if integration is enabled.
steps.expected_output: Nonce burned. Audit entry appended. Overwatch event emitted.

steps: 1. Coordinate with E: operator — rotation must happen on both sides within rollback_window_hours
2. Receive new secret out-of-band from E: operator (never in an envelope)
5. E: operator runs dry-run seal with new secret
6. Verify dry-run envelope passes GateKeeper.verify() with dry_run=True
7. If verification fails: signal E: operator to revert within rollback_window_hours
8. Log rotation event to gate/audit.ndjson with timestamp and operator
secret_rotation_sop.emergency_revocation: Delete the credential: 'cmdkey /delete:TransitionGate'. All subsequent verifications will fail fingerprint_match. Notify E: operator immediately. Do not re-issue until compromise is assessed.

never_rules.rule: Never accept an envelope whose payload_hash does not match the recomputed SHA-256. Any mismatch means the payload was tampered with after sealing.
Never accept an envelope whose user_fingerprint does not match the recomputed HMAC-SHA256. A mismatch means the secret or machine identity differs.
Never accept a replayed nonce. Once a nonce is burned, any subsequent envelope presenting the same nonce must be immediately rejected.
Never accept an envelope older than max_age_seconds (600s). Stale envelopes are a replay risk regardless of nonce status.
Never execute an action outside the envelope's declared scope.permissions. If scope says read_only, never deploy, start servers, or write results.
Never store or log the user_secret. Used only transiently for HMAC recomputation. Must never persist in logs, audit entries, config, or environment.
Never skip the audit_log step, even on rejection. Every verification attempt must produce an append-only NDJSON audit entry for forensic review.
Never use string equality (==) for fingerprint or hash comparison. Always use hmac.compare_digest to prevent timing side-channel attacks.
Never accept an envelope with tests_passed=false when require_tests is enabled in GateKeeper. The quality gate is non-negotiable.
Never accept an envelope from a source_partition not in trusted_source_partitions. Only E:\ is a trusted source.
Never allow fail-open behavior. If any verification step encounters an unexpected exception, reject the entire envelope. Ambiguity is treated as hostile.
Never modify the envelope payload before or during verification. The pipeline operates on an immutable snapshot.
Never burn a nonce before all 8 prior verification steps pass. Nonce burn happens exclusively in step 9 on a full PASS verdict.
Never operate with an expired contract (past contract_expiry.valid_until). Verification pipeline must refuse to run until a valid contract is present.

lots-server.description: Light of the Seven deployment target

experiments.description: Experimental workspace (no deploy or server permissions)

incoming.description: Sealed envelopes land here for verification

results.description: Verification results and processed envelope metadata

audit.ndjson.description: Append-only NDJSON audit trail for all verification events

.nonce_registry.json.description: Persistent nonce registry (burned nonces tracked here)

archive.description: Archived old source-like folders (read-only, no deploy)

migration_checklist.task: Store shared secret: cmdkey /add:TransitionGate /user:USER /pass:<secret> on BOTH drives
Archive existing source-like folders to archive/ if not needed as deploy targets
Create MANIFEST.md at C:\Users\USER\cascadeprojects\ documenting deployed artifacts
